mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_account WHERE user_name = #{name} AND email_addr = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_account WHERE user_name = #{name} AND phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO auth_code (contact, auth_code, auth_type, expire_time, verify_count, is_verified, created_at) VALUES (#{contact}, #{authCode}, #{authType}, #{expireTime}, 0, false, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT auth_code_id as authCodeId, contact, auth_code as authCode, auth_type as authType, expire_time as expireTime, verify_count as verifyCount, is_verified as isVerified, created_at as createdAt FROM auth_code WHERE contact = #{contact} AND auth_type = #{authType} AND expire_time > NOW() AND is_verified = false ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_account WHERE user_id = #{id} AND user_name = #{name} AND email_addr = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_account WHERE user_id = #{id} AND user_name = #{name} AND phone = #{phone}
